high_risk_notes: 0024+ tables include lineup intelligence, FAH data foundation, recommendation lock extensions, checkpoint refresh schedule and matchday evidence authority.
Static audit cannot prove live DB readers/writers without staging DB read-only evidence.

Multiple tables can represent similar facts: odds_observations/future_market_observation, raw_payload/raw_payload_references/matchday_endpoint_captures, recommendation_locks/gate5_recommendation_lock_event/shadow_strategy_lock.
